message:
fix: address 7 backend bugs in benchmark handlers (#3502, #3503, #3504, #3505, #3506, #3507, #3508) (#3524)

- #3502: Refactor fetchRunFolderStreaming to delegate to fetchRunFolder,
  ensuring streaming and non-streaming paths never diverge
- #3503: Convert 1-based stage label to 0-based index for rate lookup
- #3504: Add Drive API pagination via nextPageToken so folders with
  >1000 files are fully listed
- #3505: Release mutex before sleeping in throttle() so concurrent
  requests are not blocked for the full delay
- #3506: Normalize cache key ("0", "0d", "" all map to "0") to prevent
  duplicate cache entries and redundant Drive fetches
- #3507: Log a warning when derived input_token_rate is negative instead
  of silently dropping the value
- #3508: Count parse failures throughout the fetch pipeline and surface
  them in REST responses (parse_failures field) and SSE done events

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
